title: ChatGPT Prompt That Writes YouTube Titles
script:
[0s] This one ChatGPT prompt will write your YouTube titles for you.

[3s] Type this exactly:
[ON SCREEN TEXT] "You are a YouTube SEO expert. Write 10 click-worthy YouTube titles for a video about [your topic]. Each title must be under 60 characters, include a curiosity gap, and avoid clickbait. Format as a numbered list."

[15s] Paste that in, fill in your topic, and ChatGPT spits out 10 scroll-stopping titles in seconds.

[24s] I use this before every single upload.

[27s] Follow for more — I've got 100 of these in a pack, link in bio.
caption: This ChatGPT prompt writes better YouTube titles than I ever could. Saving this for every video I make. Follow for 100 more prompts — link in bio 🔗
